item.title: My contribution for today
item.description:
Miami’s speaking out in this heat.
Shoutout to The Plantain. Miami’s version of The Onion.
Everyone stay safe today…..and hydrated.
A lot of humor, talent and immigrants in Miami.
Kudos for all the safe protests across the country (and the globe)
This one didn’t hit home. I’m partial to bald men. ( not Miller)
Gotta include The Office!
This one ☝️
God bless our veterans.
We’re the 305
A lot of talent
item.dc:creator: ShereeAnderson
